changeSet.author: vvitzilaios
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO tpr_target_period (id, business_id, name, start_date, end_date, performance_data_template_version, performance_data_start_date, performance_data_end_date, buy_out_start_date, buy_out_end_date, is_current) VALUES (nextval('tpr_target_period_seq'), 'TP5', 'TP5 (2021-2022)', '2021-01-01', '2022-12-31', null, '2023-01-01', '2023-05-01', '2023-05-05', '2023-07-01', false);
INSERT INTO tpr_target_period (id, business_id, name, start_date, end_date, performance_data_template_version, performance_data_start_date, performance_data_end_date, buy_out_start_date, buy_out_end_date, is_current) VALUES (nextval('tpr_target_period_seq'), 'TP6', 'TP6 (2024)', '2024-01-01', '2024-12-31', '6.0', '2025-01-01', '2025-05-01', '2025-05-01', '2025-07-01', true);

rollback.sql: DELETE FROM tpr_target_period WHERE business_id IN ('TP5', 'TP6');

changeSet.author: P70383
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO tpr_certification_period (id, target_period_id, business_id, name, certification_batch_trigger_date, start_date, end_date) VALUES (nextval('tpr_certification_period_seq'), (select id from tpr_target_period where business_id = 'TP5'), 'CP6', 'CP6 (2023-2025)', '2023-07-01', '2023-07-01', '2025-06-30');
INSERT INTO tpr_certification_period (id, target_period_id, business_id, name, certification_batch_trigger_date, start_date, end_date) VALUES (nextval('tpr_certification_period_seq'), (select id from tpr_target_period where business_id = 'TP6'), 'CP7', 'CP7 (2025-2027)', '2025-07-01', '2025-07-01', '2027-03-31');

rollback.sql: DELETE FROM tpr_certification_period WHERE business_id IN ('CP6', 'CP7');

changeSet.author: P70383
P70383
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO tpr_target_period (id, business_id, name, start_date, end_date, target_period_years, buy_out_start_date, buy_out_primary_payment_deadline, secondary_reporting_start_date) VALUES (nextval('tpr_target_period_seq'), 'TP7', 'TP7 (2026)', '2026-01-01', '2026-12-31', '{"targetPeriodYears":[{"targetYear":"2026","startDate":"2026-01-01","endDate":"2026-12-31","reportingStartDate":"2027-01-01"}]}', '2027-05-05', '2027-07-01', '2027-07-02'), (nextval('tpr_target_period_seq'), 'TP8', 'TP8 (2027-2028)', '2027-01-01', '2028-12-31', '{"targetPeriodYears":[{"targetYear":"2027","startDate":"2027-01-01","endDate":"2027-12-31","reportingStartDate":"2028-01-01","reportingEndDate":"2028-12-31"},{"targetYear":"2028","startDate":"2028-01-01","endDate":"2028-12-31","reportingStartDate":"2029-01-01"}]}', '2029-05-01', '2029-07-01', '2029-07-02'), (nextval('tpr_target_period_seq'), 'TP9', 'TP9 (2029-2030)', '2029-01-01', '2030-12-31', '{"targetPeriodYears":[{"targetYear":"2029","startDate":"2029-01-01","endDate":"2029-12-31","reportingStartDate":"2030-01-01","reportingEndDate":"2030-12-31"},{"targetYear":"2030","startDate":"2030-01-01","endDate":"2030-12-31","reportingStartDate":"2031-01-01"}]}', '2031-05-01', '2031-07-01', '2031-07-02');
